howitworks.title: Ready to fire in one, two, three
howitworks.subtitle: Nothing to screw together, nothing complicated. Three steps and you're in the action.
howitworks.step1Desc: Just starting out, or want the longest range? We'll help you choose based on age and play style and send it straight to you.
howitworks.step2Desc: Soak the water beads in water and let them swell to full size for a few hours, ideally overnight. And you're loaded.
howitworks.step3Desc: On impact the bead harmlessly bursts and disappears. No bumps, no cleanup — just pure fun.

trustbar.safetyDesc: Soft ammo that's gentle on everyone.
trustbar.returnsDesc: Not a fit? We'll happily take it back.
trustbar.supportDesc: Not sure which slingshot? Message us.

categorygrid.warrantyTitle: Soft ammo, safe fun for kids

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Answers to the {count} most common customer questions. Didn't find what you were looking for?
faq.ctaDesc: Didn't find what you were looking for? Our team is here for you.
faq.shippingQ1: How fast do you ship orders?
faq.shippingA1: We dispatch orders within 24 hours of confirmation, usually the same or the next business day. We'll always let you know by email with a tracking number.
faq.shippingQ2: Which delivery services do you offer?
faq.shippingA2: We ship with Zásilkovna. Choose a pickup point or Z-BOX (89 CZK), or courier delivery to your address (129 CZK). Delivery usually takes 1–2 business days.
faq.shippingQ3: Do you deliver to Slovakia too?
faq.shippingA3: For now we only ship within Czechia. Delivery to Slovakia is coming — we'll let you know once it's live.
faq.shippingQ4: What should I do if my parcel doesn't arrive?
faq.shippingA4: If your parcel doesn't arrive within 5 business days of dispatch, contact us at info@slingr.cz or by phone. We'll check with the carrier right away and sort it out.
faq.returnsQ1: How long do I have to return goods?
faq.returnsA1: Goods bought online can be returned without giving a reason within 14 days of receipt. Just fill in the form on the Returns page and send the goods back to our address. Return shipping costs are borne by the buyer.
faq.returnsQ2: What condition must returned goods be in?
faq.returnsA2: The goods must be unused and undamaged, in the original packaging and complete (including all accessories). Otherwise we reserve the right to reduce the refund accordingly.
faq.returnsQ4: When will I get my money back?
faq.returnsA4: We refund your money within 14 days of receiving the returned goods, using the same payment method you used when buying — to your card, bank account or otherwise as agreed.
faq.paymentQ1: Which payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentA1: We accept card payments online (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfer in advance, and cash on delivery (39 CZK fee). The payment gateway is encrypted and secure.
faq.paymentA2: Absolutely. Card payments are processed by a certified payment gateway with 3D Secure encryption. Your card number never passes through our servers at any point.
faq.paymentQ3: When will the payment be taken from my account?
faq.paymentA3: With online card payment, the amount is charged immediately after you confirm the order. With a bank transfer we wait for the payment to arrive, and only then ship your parcel.
faq.productsQ1: What age are the slingshots suitable for?
faq.productsA1: Slingshots are fun for kids and adults alike. We recommend them from age 6, with adult supervision for younger children. They fire only soft ammo — foam balls, water balloons or at foam cans — so with a few basic rules in place they won't hurt anyone.
faq.productsA2: Yes. We only sell soft, lightweight ammo (foam balls, water balloons) that's gentle and doesn't hurt on impact. Common sense still applies — don't aim at anyone's face and don't use hard third-party ammo.
faq.productsQ3: What are the slingshots made of and how durable are they?
faq.productsA3: We make our slingshots from durable plastic and quality elastic rubber so they survive a whole afternoon of skirmishes and the usual drops in the garden. We test every model in action ourselves — if it doesn't survive our backyard battle, it doesn't make the lineup.
faq.productsQ4: Can I order ammo and balloons separately?
faq.productsA4: Sure. We sell spare balls, water balloons, targets and foam cans separately in the Ammo and Accessories categories, so you never run out mid-battle.
faq.supportQ1: How can I contact customer support?
faq.supportA1: You can reach us by email at info@slingr.cz, by phone at +420 605 000 887 (Mon–Fri 9am–6pm, Sat 10am–2pm) or via chat on the site. We usually reply within a few hours.
faq.supportQ2: How long does an email reply take?
faq.supportA2: We try to reply within 4 business hours. In case of high volume, we'll reply no later than the next business day.
faq.supportQ3: Can I track my order status?
faq.supportA3: Yes. After your parcel ships you'll receive an email with a link to track it with the chosen carrier. You can also track your order status in your customer account.
faq.securityQ1: How do you protect my personal data?
faq.securityA1: We process your data in line with GDPR. We don't pass it to third parties for marketing. All communication is encrypted with SSL. You'll find the details in the Privacy Policy section.
faq.securityQ2: Do you store my card number?
faq.securityA2: No. We never store card numbers and have no access to them. Payments are handled exclusively by a certified payment gateway with PCI DSS certification.

about.title: About us
about.heroDesc: The shop for slingshots and everything for outdoor battles. Start a water war or a duel for the best aim and have fun outside.
about.storyTitle: Every kid today is hidden behind a screen.
about.storyPara1: We wanted to get kids away from screens and back into the garden. That's how Slingr was born — slingshots, soft ammo and water balloons you can use for a skirmish whenever you feel like it. No fuss, just endless fun and safe play.
about.storyPara2: Today we ship slingshots and ammo all across the Czech Republic and Slovakia. We test every product in action ourselves — whatever doesn't survive our backyard battle, we don't sell.
about.value1Desc: Soft ammo and well-thought-out slingshots — fun that doesn't hurt anyone.
about.value2Desc: Orders received by 2:00 PM go out the same day.
about.value3Desc: Return goods with no questions asked within 14 days of delivery.
about.value4Desc: Behind every order are real people who enjoy shooting just as much as you do.

shipping.title: Shipping & payment
shipping.intro: We ship with Zásilkovna across Czechia. Pick a pickup point or delivery to your address and pay however suits you.
shipping.ship1Desc: Collect your parcel at a Z-BOX or pickup point. As soon as it arrives, you'll get an SMS and an email.
shipping.ship2Desc: A courier brings the parcel right to your door, usually within 1–2 business days.
shipping.pay1Desc: Fast and secure payment via a payment gateway. Visa and Mastercard.
shipping.pay2Desc: You'll get payment instructions in the confirmation email. We ship once the payment arrives.
shipping.pay3Desc: Pay on pickup – to the courier, or in advance at the pickup point.
shipping.noteDesc: Check the FAQ, or drop us a line – we're happy to help.

cookies.section2: 2. What types of cookies we use
cookies.technicalDesc: Required for the shopping cart, login and site security to work.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Let us track anonymous traffic statistics and improve the shop (PostHog).
cookies.marketingDesc: We don't use any yet — this choice will apply once we deploy such a tool.
cookies.notedRevoked: Consent has been withdrawn and analytics data from this browser deleted.
cookies.tableIntro: Below you'll find an exact overview of what our shop stores in your browser:
cookies.browserIntro: Most web browsers accept cookies automatically. However, you can manage cookies directly in your browser, where you can disable, block or delete the entire history. You'll find the setup steps in the help of your specific browser:

claims.title: Return goods within 14 days
claims.intro: Goods bought in our online shop can be returned without giving a reason within 14 days of receipt. Below you'll find the procedure and a form to notify us of your withdrawal from the contract.
claims.step1Desc: Within 14 days of receiving the goods, fill in the form below. This tells us you're withdrawing from the contract. You don't have to give a reason.
claims.step2Desc: Pack the goods in the original packaging so they won't get damaged in transit. Include a copy of the proof of purchase in the parcel. The goods must be complete and undamaged.
claims.step3Desc: Send the goods to our address within 14 days of your notification. Do not send the parcel cash on delivery, we won't accept it. The buyer bears the cost of return shipping.
claims.step4Desc: We'll refund your money within 14 days of receiving the returned goods, to the account you provide in the form.
claims.reasonPlaceholder: You don't have to give a reason. If you'd like, tell us why you're returning the goods.
claims.consentNote: By submitting the form you acknowledge the {privacy} for the purpose of handling the return and agree to the {terms}. Fields marked * are required.
claims.errOrderFormat: The order number is digits only (the variable symbol from your confirmation)
claims.errOrderNotFound: No order with this number exists. Check the number from your order confirmation.
claims.errAccount: Enter the account number for the refund
claims.errAccountFormat: Enter a valid account number (e.g. 123456789/0100 or IBAN)
claims.sentDesc: We've sent a confirmation with instructions to your email.
claims.next1Desc: A confirmation with instructions arrives within a few minutes.
claims.next2Desc: Include a copy of the proof of purchase in the parcel.
claims.next3Desc: Within 14 days of the notification, not cash on delivery.
claims.ctaDesc: Write to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
claims.errCooldown: You can submit another notification in {minutes} min.

cookieBanner.title: This website uses cookies
cookieBanner.desc: We need technical cookies for the cart and checkout to work — those can't be turned off. We use analytics cookies only with your consent to measure traffic in PostHog.
cookieBanner.descExtra: We don't sell or pass data to ad networks, and without consent nothing is sent to PostHog.
